SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-17-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: MR. JACK RHIEL appears this day for Trial de Novo on behalf of Appellant BIG O TIRES; there is NO APPEARANCE this day by Respondent MEE SUN YOU CARTER. The Court informs Mr. Jack Rhiel he will allow additional time for the Respondent to arrive and appear, to no avail this day. Thereupon, the Court takes the matter under submission; Mr. Rhiel is advised he will be notified of the Court's decision by mail. JUDGE PRO TEM: JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: Marjorie L. Manzella; NOT REPORTED (Wed., 17NOV2004, D-525).
